name: Källberga (bimbo)
description: =Allmänt= Ett ganska nytt område. Bäst i Uppsala om man vill ha många problem av hög kvalitet på samma ställe. Dessvärre kanske inte så stor framtida utvecklingspotential, men ändå; läget, stenkvaliteten, problemstandarden... - åk dit! Funkar nästa alla årstider, kan vara myggigt. Överlag bra landningar. Bra ställe för den som släpar med sig en barnvagn, hit kommer du även med de trendigaste caffémodellerna. =Förare= //trasig länk// Förare (http://tkak.mine.nu/BIMBO/bilder/3130_KB.pdf) Ny (2008) boulderförare över Uppsala finns att köpa via uppblocSNABELAgmail.com =Vägbeskrivning= Kör väg 282 mot Almunge. Sväng av första höger efter bensinmacken i Länna (vid tennisplanen). Kör några kilometer längs grusvägen tills skogen upphör och åkrar tar över. Parkera vid mötsplatsen vid blocket på åkern. Blocken ligger i skogskanten. Källberga - åsen är den ås som ligger längs vägen ett par hundra meter innan man kommer fram till åkrarna. Blocken ligger lite spridda uppe på åsen intill vägen. =Sektorer=

sections.title: Åsen
sections.body: Ligger på åsen bredvid vägen på väg mot Källberga. Öppet och trevligt, med otroligt fin granitkvalitet och mest överhängande problem.

routes.name: Sömnlös direkt

routes.name: The Forgotten One
routes.description: Sittstart to the left of Thottbot. Start RH on the crimp on the first sidepull for Thottbot and LH on the crimp a bit higher and to the left. Climb straight up.

routes.name: Den glömda
routes.description: Variant to The Forgotten One. Sittstart with both hands on the first sidepull for Thottbot and climb straight up. Ignore the LH crimp.

routes.name: Just a stone's cry away...
routes.description: Establish for 3 seconds on the 2 sidepulls on the overhanging face to the right of "Lament for a tree". Downclimb and jump to the ledge and top out as for "Lament for a tree". Now just to link it up...

routes.name: Foakenstein
routes.description: Börja med Istället för Focksta-Open assis, traversera in i Oakenstein och sedan upp och mantla.

routes.name: Ekenstein direct
routes.description: Börjar till höger om Istället för Focksta-Open och klättra rakt upp. Startar med HH i bra "pocket" under/vänster om den stora listen och VH på krimp.

images.caption: På arêten till vänster går Jaguar.

description.text:
=General=
A fairly new area. The best place in Uppsala if you want lots of high-quality problems in one spot. Unfortunately, there may not be much potential for further development, but still: the location, the rock quality, the standard of the problems... go there! Climbable in almost all seasons, though it can be mosquito-ridden. Generally good landings. A good place if you are bringing a pushchair; even the trendiest café models will make it here.

=Guidebook=
//broken link// Guidebook (http://tkak.mine.nu/BIMBO/bilder/3130_KB.pdf)
A new (2008) Uppsala bouldering guidebook can be purchased via uppblocSNABELAgmail.com

=Directions=
Take road 282 towards Almunge. Turn off at the first right after the petrol station in Länna, by the tennis court. Follow the gravel road for a few kilometres until the forest ends and the fields begin. Park at the passing place by the boulder in the field. The boulders are at the edge of the forest.

Källberga - Åsen is the ridge running alongside the road a couple of hundred metres before the fields. The boulders are scattered along the top of the ridge beside the road.

=Sectors=

body.text: Located on the ridge beside the road on the way to Källberga. Open and pleasant, with exceptionally good-quality granite and mostly overhanging problems.

description.text: Sit start, without the arete (without the large rail high on the right 6C).
Climb left by the spruce tree.
Start on the undercling.
Sit start, without the holds to the right.
Straight up on the large holds (follow the ramp right and finish on slopers 5B).
The northernmost climbed boulder on the ridge. Sit start on the right of the overhang.
Sit start.
Overhanging boulder about 50 m further in from Desperado. Roughly a sit start on the left arete.
Jump start.
Sit start from the rock, using the edge on the left and a pinch on the arete to the right.
Sit start, straight up.
Sit start, then climb up left.
Sit start using only the lowest ledge, then climb up left via a sloper.
Sit start, straight up.
Sit start, then climb up left.
High slab (Niklas slab) on the back of boulder number two. A long reach at the start is followed by a small crux that justifies Pyret's statement in the Teratologen quote used as the problem name.
The highball to the right of Snowball. Follow the crack to the top.
High wall on the first boulder. The right-hand start on crimps is 6B+.
The roadside face of the first boulder. Sit start on the left inside the corner, using the lowest holds, and move out towards the ledge.
Climb onto the slab by the large ledge.
The roadside face of the first boulder. Sit start in the middle of the overhang at the jug and climb straight up.
The roadside face of the first boulder. Sit start on the right and climb to the jugs on the arete feature.
Start as for Simulacrum, but climb up left to incut holds on the slab without using the jugs on the arete.
The overhang on the first boulder. Sit start at the far right, traverse left to the large ledge and top out.
Sit start on the large ledge and climb straight up.
Sit start left of the ledge, then climb up left without using the ledge.
Sit start, straight up.
In the tunnel between the first boulders. Start on the huge ledge on boulder 1, traverse right past Svalan and finish around the corner via the crack.
Opposite Subway. Start at the large hold, move right to the crimps, then climb up between the boulders.
The obvious sit start to Svalan... Start on the sidepulls directly below the original problem and top out via Svalan without using a heel hook.
Climb up left by the large ledge (without the large rail at the start 6A).
Sit start on the large ledge, then climb left (without the rail 6A+).
Sit start on the large ledge and traverse low to the left arete.
Sit start and keep right of the arete, without using the edge on the left.
Sit start.
Sit start and keep right of the arete.
In the tunnel between the first boulders. Sit start on a large hold, pull up right on underclings and finish by matching the jug beneath the roof (no top-out).
The arete on the shard of rock between the first two boulders. Sit start and climb polished slopers. Källberga's Bananbänken – good, low and softly graded.
Start on the slopers by the arete.
Start low on the large ledge.
Sit start on a large hold, then move left towards the arete.
Sit start on a large hold and climb straight up.
Boulder 2, the high wall. Straight up.
The beautiful face on boulder 3.
The face to the right of Deliberation.
By Jaguar. Sit start and climb straight up the face without moving onto the holds left of the arete. A natural line despite the eliminate.
The fine arete on boulder 3.
Start on the large sidepulls and climb straight up.
Start on the same large hold as Leguan and climb directly to the slopers on the lip, without using the holds out left.
Start on the large hold.
5A from a sit start.
Sit start on the large sloper and mantle straight up.
Sit start at the corner on the large hold, traverse right around the arete and mantle.
Sit start at the corner on the large hold and climb straight up, without the ledge on the right.
Sit start at the corner on the large hold, then climb up left onto the arete.
Sit start on an undercut and a crimp.
Sit start, then move out left onto the slab.
Climb up left towards the highest point of the slab.
Wall.
Sit start, then climb straight up the arete feature.
Wall.
Sit start on a sidepull and an undercut.
Sit start on the right, traverse low to the left to the large hold, then top out.
Follow the large edge.
On the back of boulder 5. Start from the platform on crimps and climb straight up to a tricky top-out.
Start on the same holds as The Golden Guzzlers. Climb out right. An obvious line.
Sit start, then climb directly up right into Dynamische Doppelpack direct.
The easiest line from a standing start on the overhang of boulder 5. Perhaps 6c+ using Sydde's sequence.
An extension to Dynamische Doppelpack. Sit start at the large ledge, avoiding the huge holds on the left.
Start on the large edge in the middle of the wall, then climb straight up without the sidepulls out left.
Climb straight up towards the corner.
Start on the right and climb up left into Dynamische Doppelback.
Sit start on the left.
The sit-start extension to Mörkret on the Kashmir boulder.
Sit start at Träskotarzan assis on boulder 6 and traverse left into Kashmir.
The sit-start extension to Träskotarzan on the Kashmir boulder.
Start on the pinch and large sidepull, then climb straight up.
Sit start.
From the sidepulls, climb up left towards the small crack without using the holds on the right.
On boulder 6. Sit start at the large hold and climb straight up.
Sit start left of Kashmir and climb slightly up left, using the hold out in the groove on the left.
Low sit start at the arete on an edge and a sloper, then climb up left.
Low sit start at the arete on an edge and a sloper, then climb up right.
Climb straight up without the edge on the left.
Sit start.
Follow the crack left of Snowball (about 6.35 metres high).
Left of The Golden Guzzlers on the back of boulder 5. Climb up the edge.
In the middle of the high wall on boulder 2. A crimpy start and a fairly high finish trending left.
Start low on good slopers left of Volvojävel on boulder 2. Traverse diagonally up left and finish at the boulder's left-hand corner.
As for Sömnlös, but climb straight up from the micro-crimps rather than going left to the groove.
Sit start left of Thottbot. Start with your right hand on the crimp on Thottbot's first sidepull and your left hand on the crimp slightly higher and to the left. Climb straight up.
A variant of The Forgotten One. Sit start with both hands on Thottbot's first sidepull and climb straight up. Do not use the left-hand crimp.

Establish for 3 seconds on the two sidepulls on the overhanging face to the right of "Lament for a tree". Downclimb and jump to the ledge, then top out as for "Lament for a tree". Now just to link it up...
Start with Istället för Focksta-Open assis, traverse into Oakenstein, then climb up and mantle.
Start to the right of Istället för Focksta-Open and climb straight up. Start with RH in a good pocket below and left of the large edge, and LH on a crimp.
